claim: Vrijmoed at Vlaanderenstraat 22 holds two Michelin stars under chef Michaël Vrijmoed, trained under Peter Goossens (Hof van Cleve)
quote: Award-winning young chef Michaël Vrijmoed concocts creative dishes with his signature touch, and his restaurant has been awarded two Michelin stars.

claim: Gault&Millau 2026 Ten to Taste list for Gent: Vrijmoed 17.5/20, Oak 16.5/20, Sensum 15.5/20, Souvenir 15.5/20, Commotie 15/20, Karel de Stoute 15/20, Publiek 15/20, Elders 14.5/20, Roots 14.5/20, Rizoom 14.5/20
quote: Vrijmoed 17.5/20 ... Oak 16.5/20 ... Sensum 15.5/20 ... Souvenir 15.5/20 ... Commotie 15/20 ... Karel de Stoute 15/20 ... Publiek 15/20 ... Elders 14.5/20 ... Roots 14.5/20 ... Rizoom 14.5/20

claim: OAK (Burgstraat 16) is a one-Michelin-star contemporary restaurant by chef Marcelo Ballardin in a 17C edifice with 24 seats
quote: OAK is happily ensconced in the heart of historic Gent, in a 17C edifice ... With only 24 seats available.

claim: Publiek at Ham 39 holds one Michelin star; chef Olly Ceulenaere champions little-known vegetables and avoids luxury products like truffles and caviar
quote: Publiek is the restaurant of Flemish Foodie Olly Ceulenaere and was awarded one Michelin star ... Olly Ceulenaere is a staunch champion of little-known veggies.

claim: Sensum, in a castle on the Ghent ring canal in Sint-Denijs-Westrem, was awarded its first Michelin star in 2023 — Ghent's sixth starred restaurant at the time
quote: since 2023 a starred restaurant ... The sixth starred restaurant in the city on the Leie.

claim: Sensum is run by Dutch couple Maurice de Jaeger (chef) and Deborah Hellburg (host/sommelier); the restaurant is the sequel to Vinum & Sensum in Knokke
quote: Sensum is the sequel to Vinum & Sensum, their illustrious predecessor in Knokke.

claim: Souvenir held a Michelin star and a Michelin Green Star for sustainable gastronomy under chef Vilhjalmur Sigurdarson
quote: Souvenir - Sustainable gastronomy from Michelin Green Star restaurant

claim: Souvenir's team closed the Brabantdam location in 2025 after 11 years; chef Sigurdarson and Joke Michiel now run bistro Lubbi in Gentbrugge and catering service Le Petit Garçon
quote: the owners announced the restaurant would close after 11 years ... They opened bistro Lubbi in a former hospital on Kliniekstraat in Gentbrugge.

claim: Hof van Cleve in Kruisem (≈30km from Ghent) was directly awarded two Michelin stars under successor chef Floris Van Der Veken in the 2024 guide, after holding three stars for nearly two decades under founder Peter Goossens
quote: Hof van Cleve - Floris Van Der Veken and Sir Kwinten awarded Two Stars in the MICHELIN Guide Belgium and Luxembourg 2024

claim: Peter Goossens handed Hof van Cleve to Floris Van Der Veken on 1 January 2024 after the restaurant had held three Michelin stars since 2005
quote: Peter Goossens to leave 3-star Hof van Cleve.

claim: Bar Bask is a Michelin Bib Gourmand in Ghent built around an Asador Basque grill, in a former gas station with views of the Scheldt
quote: Bar Bask holds a Bib Gourmand designation.

claim: Boris & Maurice in Sint-Amandsberg is a Michelin Bib Gourmand French-inspired bistro by reservation only, with a weekly lunch and monthly seasonal menu
quote: Boris & Maurice is a Michelin Bib Gourmand restaurant — recognized for good quality, good value cooking.

claim: LOF Restaurant inside Pillows Hotel Reylof is a gastronomic concept tied to Dutch 3-star chef Paul de Groote (formerly 20 years at Inter Scaldes under Jannis Brevet)
quote: LOF Restaurant - new gastronomic concept in collaboration with the famous Dutch Michelin star chef Paul de Groote.

claim: Roots in the Patershol district is Michelin-listed; chef Kim Devisschere serves bistronomic tasting menus from organic, locally sourced ingredients
quote: Kim Devisschere's uninhibited, no-holds barred cooking, doubled with a commitment to organic, locally sourced ingredients.

claim: Karel de Stoute in Patershol is a Michelin selection (two black knife-and-fork comfort symbols) under chef Thomas De Muynck — modern, creative fare with a subtle Asian twang
quote: Karel de Stoute ... 2 black knife-and-fork symbols indicating ultimate comfort. Chef Thomas rolls out modern, creative fare with a subtle Asian twang.

claim: Commotie in Sint-Amandsberg, run by chef Thomas Gellynck and sommelier Lara De Vlieger since 2020, cooks over open fire with Japanese-inspired minimalism, fermentation, and produce from its own garden
quote: The kitchen revolves around open fire, honest seasonal ingredients, foraging, fermentation, and produce from their own garden.

claim: Elders (Edmond Van Beverenplein 16) was named Gault&Millau Gastro-Bistro of the Year 2025 under chef Tom Pauweleyn
quote: Gastro-bistro van het jaar: Elders (chef Tom Pauweleyn).

claim: Le Julien (Prinsenstraat 9, Aalter-Lotenhulle, ≈25km from Ghent) earned Gault&Millau 16/20 and 3 chef's hats; chef Davy Devlieghere trained under Peter Goossens, Viki Geunes and Danny Horseele
quote: Chef Davy Devlieghere ... a tribute to French pastry and his mentors Peter Goossens, Viki Geunes and Danny Horseele.

claim: Le Julien won Gault&Millau Belgium 2026 'Dessert of the Year' for a Paris-Brest with hazelnut praline and vanilla ice cream
quote: Restaurant Le Julien in Lotenhulle serveert 'Dessert van het Jaar'.

claim: The Gault&Millau Belux 2026 guide is the 23rd edition with 1,340+ restaurants, 154 newcomers and 166 risers; Karen Torosyan (Bozar, Brussels) is Chef of the Year, Kevin Graf (De Bakermat, Ninove) Young Chef of the Year for Flanders
quote: 23rd edition ... more than 1,340 addresses, including 154 newcomers and 166 risers ... Chef of the Year: Karen Torosyan (Bozar) ... Young Chefs of the Year: Kevin Graf (De Bakermat, Ninove) for Flanders.

claim: Snack bar Martino (Ghent) — open since 1955 — was crowned Gault&Millau H!P 2026 winner for Flanders
quote: HIP Martino - Gault&Millau Belgium

claim: The current Michelin Guide Belgium & Luxembourg edition (2025) lists 790 restaurants of which 151 are starred
quote: MICHELIN Guide Belgium & Luxembourg 2025.

claim: OAK is run by chef Marcelo Ballardin; the dining room is intimate at 24 seats and the chef often greets diners himself
quote: Oak Gent

claim: Publiek's seasonal, ingredient-led menus avoid luxury products and focus on local seasonal flavours
quote: PUBLIEK | publiekgent

claim: Hof van Cleve held three Michelin stars from 2005 to 2023 under Peter Goossens; the restaurant is in Kruisem (East Flanders), about 30km southwest of Ghent
quote: Hof van Cleve ... has been awarded three Michelin stars.

claim: Hof van Cleve continues operating under chef-owner Floris Van Der Veken, upholding the codes set by Peter Goossens
quote: Hof van Cleve - Floris Van Der Veken

claim: Gault&Millau gives Sensum (Kortrijksesteenweg 1026, Sint-Denijs-Westrem) a 2026 score of 15.5/20
quote: Restaurant Sensum - Gault&Millau Belgium

claim: LOF Restaurant occupies the former townhouse of baron and poet Olivier de Reylof inside Pillows Hotel Reylof
quote: the former town house of baron and poet Olivier de Reylof.

claim: Karel de Stoute holds a Gault&Millau 2026 score of 15/20 in the Patershol
quote: Restaurant Karel de Stoute - Gault&Millau Belgium

claim: Gault&Millau lists Commotie's cuisine as 'Creative' with Thomas Gellynck at the helm
quote: Restaurant Commotie - Gault&Millau Belgium

claim: Bar Bask sits in a former gas station near the Scheldt and centres its kitchen on a wood-fired Asador grill, lined with refined seafood and txuleta steak
quote: everything revolves around pure flavors and honest ingredients ... refrigerated counter displays seafood treats.
